Understanding The Front-End Sale:
What Is The 	!
Front-End?
Module 2 - Lesson 1

-- 1 of 5 --

2 Categories Of Marketing In A Direct-
Response Business:!
• Front-End: All the marketing you do with
prospects to convert them into a new
customer. 	!
• Backend: All the marketing you do with
customers to deepen your relationship and
generate additional transactions.
Module 2 - Lesson 1
Understanding The Front-End Sale:

-- 2 of 5 --

The Purpose Of Each:!
• Front-End: To generate maximum new
customers. 	!
• Backend: To grow the average lifetime
customer value.
Module 2 - Lesson 1
Understanding The Front-End Sale:

-- 3 of 5 --

How The A-Players View Each:!
• Front-End: The vehicle to simply acquire
customers and 	not 	a source of profit.!
• Backend: The real business we’re in and
where all the profit comes from!
Module 2 - Lesson 1
Understanding The Front-End Sale:

-- 4 of 5 --

The 3 Objectives Of Your Front-End Offer:!
• To attract the “right type” of customer!
• To convert a prospect into a new customer!
• To set-up the sale of your first backend offer
Module 2 - Lesson 1
Understanding The Front-End Sale:

-- 5 of 5 --
